description_long: This bungalow features a single-story brick structure with a prominent dark gabled roof and a symmetrical facade. The front entrance is accentuated by a central gable projection, flanked by large glass doors and windows that allow ample natural light. A detached garage sits to one side, connected by a paved driveway that wraps around the property. The house is surrounded by a neatly manicured lawn and bordered by paved walkways, providing access to all sides. The rear and side elevations display additional large windows, maintaining a consistent window pattern throughout. The overall design is simple yet functional, with a focus on accessibility and suburban comfort.
description: A single-story brick bungalow with a dark gabled roof, large windows, and a detached garage, surrounded by lawn and paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a central gable, large glass doors, and the detached garage to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full gable end, three large windows, and the wraparound driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying symmetrical window placement and the garage on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable end, the detached garage in the foreground, and the surrounding lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with evenly spaced side and rear windows
